theme: cargo manifest graded at the 20th percentile
title: Hedged Cargo Manifest at the 20th Percentile
strategies: trivial: value-blind lightest-items fill to ~1/3 capacity -- tiny low-value bundle (checker baseline)

greedy: expected-value knapsack -- rank items by mean payoff per resource and fill both capacities; maximizes the average total but piles into high-mean HI items that all crash together at the low-f scenarios, craters the 20th-percentile

strong: portfolio/CVaR view -- fill by how much each item lifts the CURRENT bundle's tail (sum of lowest-k scenario totals), automatically pulling in anti-correlated LO items to hedge the market crash the HI-heavy bundle is exposed to
headroom above strong: exact tail-quantile optimization / pair-aware search over which HI+LO combinations balance every scenario rather than a one-pass tail-greedy
